ItacAcademyItem.Name: Partenia (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Bees sucking pollen from flowers in a garden
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: In obitu Fabricii Gentinii, & Ioannis Prampolini e` congregatione Ferrariensi Beatissimae Virginis Dei Matris Annunciatae, et academicorum Partheniorum, in gymnasio societatis Iesu: Academiae Partheniae carmina (Ferrariae: apud Benedictum Mamarellum, 1590)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
